Core_Functionality: Calculates risk indexes based on relative humidity, maize core moisture, and storage days.
Kenya_Context_Reference: Kiambu County Maize Milling Study (Wangeci Wanjiru et al., 2023) - KAP on HACCP for aflatoxin mitigation.
Compliance_Metric: Actionable Critical Limits (ppb boundaries < 10ppb KEBS threshold)

Core_Functionality: Real-time logger monitoring for pasteurization / steaming CCP thermal death time calculations (D-value/z-value).
Kenya_Context_Reference: Homa Bay County OFSP Puree Processing Study (Malavi et al., 2018) - Core post-processing thermal log analysis.
Compliance_Metric: Continuous temperature verification log (> 72°C for 15s critical limits)

Core_Functionality: Automates plate-count colony tracking, dilution factor math, and Flags limits exceeding regulatory legal caps.
Kenya_Context_Reference: Nairobi Butchery Value Chain Survey (Koech et al., 2024) - High microbial loads and non-compliance with KEBS raw beef limits.
Compliance_Metric: KEBS Limit Check (< 100 CFU/g for E. coli in retail meat products)

Core_Functionality: Dynamic digital inspection scorecard assessing personnel hygiene, open water channels, and contact surface layouts.
Kenya_Context_Reference: Nairobi & Isiolo SME Butchery Sanitation Audit (Chepkemoi et al., 2023) - Evaluates lack of health certs & poor sanitation.
Compliance_Metric: Compliance Percentage Score (Overall score mapping with 58% baseline comparison)

Core_Functionality: Interprets control, context, and assurance activities to assign risk levels (Low, Moderate, High).
Kenya_Context_Reference: SME Beverage Processing Diagnostic Framework (Cheah et al., 2021) - Core validation tool for FSMS operational maturity.
Compliance_Metric: Maturity Tiers (Level 1 to Level 3 Score Grid)

Core_Functionality: Processes multi-point environmental assay reports tracking processing water and equipment rinse cycles.
Kenya_Context_Reference: Homa Bay Processing Plant Environmental Sampling (Malavi et al., 2018) - Water source cross-contamination vectors.
Compliance_Metric: Absence indicator per 100mL sample (0 CFU/100mL constraint)
